title: Attribute Adventure
description: Add attribute mechanics similar to those in Monster Hunter to the vanilla game, including attribute damage and attribute absorption.
body:
Add attribute mechanics similar to those in Monster Hunter to the vanilla game, including attribute damage and attribute absorption.

You can use the Attribute Book in the game on an anvil to add new attributes to a sword.

You can also use the Attribute Book to refresh attributes.

Additionally, the game's critical hit system has been revised. Players can only achieve critical hits using weapons with critical rate or by using the Critical Hit enchantment.
